package rulecoverage

func NegativeGormModelContainsBindingOrValidateTags() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_model_contains_binding_or_validate_tags"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "GORM models that accumulate transport validation and binding concerns."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
